query:
SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, se.stationCode AS station_code, se.businessDate,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd_counts.cnt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS events_without_detail,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd_counts.cnt = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS events_with_single_detail,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd_counts.cnt > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS events_with_duplicate_details,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd_counts.cnt > 1 THEN psd_counts.cnt - 1 ELSE 0 END) AS extra_duplicate_rows
FROM station_events se
JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT stationEventId, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM productivity_score_details
  GROUP BY stationEventId
) psd_counts ON psd_counts.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND se.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name, se.stationCode, se.businessDate
ORDER BY u.name, se.businessDate, se.stationCode;

       SUM(CASE WHEN psd_counts.cnt > 1 THEN psd_counts.cnt - 1 ELSE 0 END) AS extra_duplicate_rows
FROM station_events se
JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT stationEventId, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM productivity_score_details
  GROUP BY stationEventId
) psd_counts ON psd_counts.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')

GROUP BY u.name, se.stationCode, se.businessDate
ORDER BY u.name, se.businessDate, se.stationCode;
